message:
fix: dolt-archive grep -v exits 1 under pipefail when no remotes configured

Wrap the pipeline in `{ ...; || true; }` inside the command substitution so
grep's exit-1-on-no-match doesn't kill the script under `set -euo pipefail`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -175,7 +175,7 @@ if ! $SKIP_DOLT_PUSH; then
       continue
     fi
 
-    REMOTES=$(cd "$DB_DIR" && dolt remote -v 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$" | head -5)
+    REMOTES=$(cd "$DB_DIR" && { dolt remote -v 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$" | head -5 || true; })
     if [[ -z "$REMOTES" ]]; then
       log "  $DB: no remotes configured, skipping"
       continue
